name: Wand of Conducting
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can create orchestral music within 60 feet.

name: Wand of Pyrotechnics
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can create a burst of colored light or smoke.

name: Wand of Scowls
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can force a creature to scowl (DC 10 Cha save).

name: Wand of Smiles
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can force a creature to smile (DC 10 Cha save).

name: Wand of Magic Detection
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can cast Detect Magic using charges.

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can cast Magic Missile using charges.

name: Wand of Secrets
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Locates the nearest secret door or trap within 30 feet.

name: Wand of the War Mage, +1
stat_impact: Permanent: +1 bonus to spell attack rolls. Ignore half cover when making spell attacks.

name: Wand of Web
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can cast Web (DC 15) using charges.

name: Wand of Binding
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can cast Hold Person (DC 17) or Hold Monster (DC 17) using charges.

name: Wand of Enemy Detection
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Detects hostile creatures within 60 feet.

name: Wand of Fear
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can cast Fear (DC 15) or create a cone of fear.

name: Wand of Fireballs
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can cast Fireball (DC 15) using charges.

name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can cast Lightning Bolt (DC 15) using charges.

name: Wand of Paralysis
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Forces a creature to make a DC 15 Con save or be paralyzed.

name: Wand of the War Mage, +2
stat_impact: Permanent: +2 bonus to spell attack rolls. Ignore half cover when making spell attacks.

name: Wand of Wonder
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Creates a random magical effect from a table of 100 possibilities.

name: Wand of the War Mage, +3
stat_impact: Permanent: +3 bonus to spell attack rolls. Ignore half cover when making spell attacks.

name: Wand of Polymorph
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Can cast Polymorph (DC 15) using charges.

name: Wand of Viscid Globs
stat_impact: No permanent stat changes. Makes a ranged attack to restrain a creature in sticky slime.

name: Wand of Orcus
stat_impact: Permanent: +3 bonus to AC. While held, functions as a +3 magical mace. Grants various high-level spells and necromantic powers.
